_schema_meta.insurer: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited
_schema_meta.notes: Pure product rules. No user data. Shared across every user who uploads an Optima Restore policy. Optima Restore differs from Optima Secure in three critical ways: (1) No Protect Benefit — Annexure I consumables are explicitly excluded. (2) No Secure Benefit — no additional SI pool. (3) Multiplier Benefit replaces Plus Benefit — same 50% accrual mechanics but different name. Restore benefit mechanics are also different from Optima Secure — base restore is once per year only.

room_rent.insight: No room rent cap. Any room category can be chosen without triggering proportionate deduction on the entire bill. Most policies cap room at 1% of SI per day and penalise the whole bill if exceeded — this one does not.

exceptions: waived on continuous renewal beyond 12 months
initial_waiting_days.insight: 30-day initial waiting applies only at first inception. Waived on continuous renewal. Accidents covered from day 1.

specific_disease_waiting.enhanced_si_note: Waiting period applies afresh only to the extent of enhanced sum insured
specific_disease_waiting.interaction_with_ped: If a specified disease also qualifies as PED, the longer of the two waiting periods applies
illnesses: Cysts and polyps including breast lumps
Ulcer and erosion of stomach and duodenum
Calculus diseases of Urogenital system including Kidney, ureter, bladder stones
Benign tumors of Non infectious etiology — cysts, nodules, polyps, lump, growth
surgical_procedures: Surgery of varicose veins and varicose ulcers
specific_disease_waiting.clause: Section C.1.ii — Code Excl02 — Policy Wording Pages 19-21
specific_disease_waiting.insight: 24 months waiting from first inception for listed conditions — regardless of whether pre-existing. Key conditions buyers miss: cataract, kidney stones, hernia, gallbladder, joint replacement, piles surgery, prostate surgery, sinusitis. Enhanced SI restarts this clock only for the enhanced portion.

exceptions: waived per schedule if portability or continuity credit applies
ped_waiting.enhanced_si_note: Waiting period applies afresh only to the extent of enhanced sum insured
ped_waiting.insight: Pre-existing diseases have a 36-month waiting period from first inception. Portability and continuity credit can reduce this. Enhanced SI restarts the clock only on the enhanced portion.

base_restore.trigger: complete or partial utilisation of existing Policy Sum Insured and Multiplier Benefit during the Policy Year
base_restore.single_claim_cap: A single claim in a Policy Year cannot exceed the sum of Basic Sum Insured and Multiplier Benefit
base_restore.expiry: Restored SI expires if not utilised in the same policy year
base_restore.family_floater_note: In Family Floater policies, Restore SI is available on floater basis for all insured persons
base_restore.insight: Base Restore automatically adds 100% of Basic SI once per year when SI is exhausted or partially used. Restored amount is available for any illness including same disease in the same year. However a single claim cannot exceed Base + Multiplier combined — this is the per-claim ceiling.

unlimited_restore_addon.trigger: complete or partial utilisation of Restore benefit or Unlimited Restore benefit during Policy Year
unlimited_restore_addon.single_claim_cap: A single claim cannot exceed Basic Sum Insured + Multiplier Benefit
unlimited_restore_addon.insight: Unlimited Restore must be explicitly opted — it is NOT default. It triggers unlimited times in a policy year after base Restore is used. If not opted, restore is once per year only.

multiplier_benefit.amount_per_year: 50% of Basic Sum Insured of expiring policy
multiplier_benefit.note: This is NOT a no-claim bonus. It accrues whether or not claims were made. Once added it carries forward to subsequent policy years subject to no break in policy.
multiplier_benefit.insight: Multiplier Benefit grows SI by 50% at each renewal regardless of claims, capped at 100% of Basic SI. After 2 years with no SI reduction, the Multiplier is fully accrued and locked. A lapse resets this.

base_hospitalization_covers: Medicines, drugs and consumables — as part of in-patient treatment
consumables_coverage.protector_rider_note: Protector Rider is an optional add-on that covers Annexure I excluded items. Must be explicitly opted.
consumables_coverage.ezer_comparison_note: Optima Restore EXCLUDES Annexure I items. Optima Secure INCLUDES them via Protect Benefit (default ON). This is one of the most significant product differences between the two HDFC ERGO products.
consumables_coverage.clause: Section B.1.a + Annexure I — Policy Wording Pages 11 and 47
consumables_coverage.insight: Consumables coverage on Optima Restore is significantly weaker than Optima Secure. Annexure I items — gloves, syringes, masks, diapers, PPE, attendant charges and 60+ others — are NOT covered and will be deducted from every claim settlement. Budget ₹10,000-30,000 extra out-of-pocket per hospitalisation. The Protector Rider covers these but must be explicitly opted.

post_hospitalization.insight: 180 days post-discharge coverage — significantly better than the industry standard of 60-90 days. Keep all post-discharge receipts and file one consolidated claim before the 180-day window closes.

preventive_health_checkup.basis: per insured person, at end of each year at renewal

amount_by_base_si.5L: Rs. 1,500 per insured person — once at end of every 2 continuous policy years
amount_by_base_si.10L: Rs. 2,000 per insured person — at end of each year at renewal
amount_by_base_si.15L: Rs. 4,000 per insured person — at end of each year at renewal
amount_by_base_si.20L_25L_50L_100L: Rs. 5,000 per insured person — at end of each year at renewal

preventive_health_checkup.claimable_timing: After policy renews — NOT during current policy year
preventive_health_checkup.insight: Health checkup benefit is claimable only after renewal — not during the current year. Does not carry forward if unclaimed. Get checkup done before renewal date and claim it in the first months of the renewed policy.

daily_cash_shared_accommodation.condition: Hospitalised in shared accommodation in a Network Hospital, hospitalisation exceeds 48 hours

conditions: Medical evacuation prescribed by Medical Practitioner
Insured person in India, treatment in India only
Air ambulance provider registered in India

ambulance.clause: Section B.1.g and B.1.j — Policy Wording Pages 12-13

moratorium_period.effect: After 60 continuous months of coverage, insurer cannot contest policy or claim on grounds of non-disclosure or misrepresentation — except for proven fraud and permanent exclusions specified in the policy
moratorium_period.enhanced_si_note: 60-month clock restarts from date of enhancement only for the enhanced SI portion

cashless_process.preauthorization_tat: Decision within 1 hour of request receipt
cashless_process.final_bill_authorization_tat: Within 3 hours of discharge request from hospital
cashless_process.reimbursement_settlement_tat: 30 days from last necessary document received

standard_general: Investigation and evaluation only admissions — Code Excl04
Rest cure, rehabilitation, respite care — Code Excl05
Obesity surgery not meeting BMI criteria — Code Excl06
Cosmetic or plastic surgery — Code Excl08
Hazardous or adventure sports as professional — Code Excl09
Alcoholism, drug or substance abuse — Code Excl12
Treatments in health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas — Code Excl13
Dietary supplements without prescription — Code Excl14
Refractive error less than 7.5 dioptres — Code Excl15
specific_general: Dental treatment unless requiring hospitalisation — C.3.23
Hearing aids, spectacles, contact lenses — C.3.11
Prosthetic devices removable without surgery — C.3.4
Annexure I non-medical items — 68 items explicitly excluded — C.3.16
key_exclusions.clause: Section C.2 and C.3 — Policy Wording Pages 21-25

optional_addons_available: Protector Rider — covers Annexure I excluded items
ABCD Chronic Care — hospitalization for Asthma, BP, Cholesterol, Diabetes after 30-day wait
Limitless — infinite value claims up to specified number
Parenthood — maternity, IVF, embryo storage after 2-year wait
Critical Advantage Rider — planned treatment abroad for 8 major illnesses
